assertions.assertion: Mentions DefaultClockSkew as the relevant setting
assertions.rationale: Clearly identifies DefaultClockSkew as the key setting.

assertions.assertion: Suggests increasing the value beyond the default 5 minutes
assertions.rationale: Suggests increasing to 10 minutes and notes the default is 5 minutes.

assertions.assertion: Does NOT suggest changes to the OIDC/OAuth configuration — this is SAML-specific
assertions.rationale: All configuration is SAML-specific under options.Saml. No OIDC/OAuth changes suggested.
